matchedText: Course closed for this cycle: Engineering for Sustainable Development is no longer accepting applications for this cycle. It is expected to re-open for new applications in early September.
matchedTextAfter: The Engineering for Sustainable Development MPhil course is designed for graduates who want to help tackle pressing global problems by developing practical engineering solutions. It is is not an engineering course, but rather a course
